// @ts-ignore TS6133 import { expect, test } from "vitest"; import * as z from "zod/v3"; import { util } from "../helpers/util.js"; test("void", () => { const v = z.void(); v.parse(undefined); expect(() => v.parse(null)).toThrow(); expect(() => v.parse("")).toThrow(); type v = z.infer<typeof v>; util.assertEqual<v, void>(true); });
